assumption: DfT engagement is treated as non-statutory process engagement and must not be described as approval or statutory confirmation.
basis: Legal Review Agent Stage 1 due diligence.

assumption: As at 25 June 2026 the acquired Bristol governance evidence does not approve WPL implementation statutory consultation launch FBC preferred scheme boundary charge thresholds or exemptions.
